what_the_reference_supports: Supports Arabidopsis shoot gravity-sensing biology involving statolith/amyloplast-related sensing after reorientation.
what_it_does_not_support: Does not show Senecio lautus; does not test 8-hour Senecio family-level bending trajectories.
transfer_caveat: Use as Arabidopsis mechanism prior only until Senecio evidence is found.

what_the_reference_supports: Supports the endodermal/statocyte tissue context for Arabidopsis shoot gravity sensing.
what_it_does_not_support: This is a context relation rather than a simple signed FlashP causal edge; it does not establish Senecio-specific tissue mechanisms.

what_the_reference_supports: Supports a close mechanistic refinement in which LZY-family genes act in gravity signalling downstream of gravity perception in Arabidopsis.
what_it_does_not_support: Does not prove a direct physical edge from amyloplast displacement to every LZY module component; does not show Senecio transfer.

tissue_stage: shoot/root gravity signalling and auxin flow
citation_short: Taniguchi et al. 2017; Nakamura et al. 2011
what_the_reference_supports: Supports LZY/LAZY involvement in gravity signalling linked to auxin transport redistribution; Nakamura et al. 2011 is an additional seed support for LAZY1-like function.
what_it_does_not_support: Does not show Senecio; the exact PIN target and tissue context may need refinement.
transfer_caveat: Use as Arabidopsis prior and refine node names later.

what_the_reference_supports: Supports PIN-dependent auxin redistribution/asymmetry during Arabidopsis gravitropic response.
what_it_does_not_support: Hypocotyl evidence is not the same as Senecio shoot-family evidence; may not capture 8-hour family differences.
transfer_caveat: Use as conserved auxin-transport prior only.

what_the_reference_supports: Supports the link between auxin asymmetry/response and differential growth in Arabidopsis gravitropic bending.
what_it_does_not_support: Does not directly measure Senecio shoots or family-level agravitropism.

what_the_reference_supports: Supports differential growth leading to curvature in an Arabidopsis gravitropic-response context.
what_it_does_not_support: Does not establish Senecio-specific developmental or evolutionary differences.

what_the_reference_supports: This edge is conceptually close to phenotype definition but still needs an explicit measurement reference for the target experiment.
what_it_does_not_support: No direct DOI-backed support has been entered for dark 8-hour Senecio bending trajectories.
transfer_caveat: Needs direct phenotype-measurement evidence before support upgrade.

what_the_reference_supports: No direct evidence has been entered that Senecio family/genotype differences alter LZY-module behaviour.
what_it_does_not_support: Arabidopsis mechanism papers do not establish Senecio family-level genetic modulation.
transfer_caveat: Keep as hypothesis until Senecio comparative evidence is found.

what_the_reference_supports: No direct evidence has been entered that Senecio family/genotype differences alter PIN-mediated auxin redistribution.
what_it_does_not_support: Arabidopsis mechanism papers do not establish Senecio family-level transport differences.
transfer_caveat: Keep as hypothesis until Senecio comparative evidence is found.

what_the_reference_supports: No direct evidence has been entered that Senecio family/genotype differences alter differential cell expansion during shoot bending.
what_it_does_not_support: Arabidopsis mechanism papers do not establish Senecio family-level growth-response differences.
transfer_caveat: Keep as hypothesis until Senecio comparative evidence is found.

what_the_reference_supports: No direct Senecio DOI-backed evidence has been entered for family/genotype effects on 8-hour shoot gravitropic bending.
what_it_does_not_support: Arabidopsis mechanism papers cannot support this comparative evolutionary edge.
transfer_caveat: This is a priority target for Senecio-specific literature search.

what_the_reference_supports: No direct DOI-backed evidence has been entered defining gravitropic versus agravitropic Senecio families from bending trajectories.
what_it_does_not_support: Arabidopsis mechanism papers do not support Senecio family classification.
